characters.name: Aah
characters.description: Aahis a monster andRoar's love interest appeared at the end of "Frankengloom". Introduced byQueen Delightful, Aah was created byDocusing aMake Your Own Monster Kitfor Roar to keep him company afterthe 7Dhelped him preparing his overall appearance to pass an audition to enterDo-Re-Mi Academyas well as defeating his creators,HildyandGrim. LikeRoar, Aah is reptilian-like, but she is olive green-skinned with webbed hands and purple fingernails. There are two large pink fins on the top of her head and a tail on her rear. She also has huge red lips and wears a pink skirt.

characters.name: Aah

She also has huge red lips and wears a pink skirt.

characters.name: Banshee Barista
characters.description: Banshee Barista[1]is a minor character working at an unnamed coffee shop where theTooth Fairyorders her frappe in "Smarty Tooth". Because she's a banshee, she has no indoor voice and yells loudly.

characters.name: Banshee Barista
characters.description: Banshee Barista[1]is a minor character working at an unnamed coffee shop where theTooth Fairyorders her frappe in "Smarty Tooth". Because she's a banshee, she has no indoor voice and yells loudly.

characters.name: Baroness BonBon
characters.description: Baroness BonBonis a character in the episode "The 7D and the Beast", voiced byCandi Milo.[1] In the said episode, Baroness BonBon vanishes, leadingthe 7Dto search for her. She is later revealed to be the furry monster transformed by Hildy by eating a cursed bon bon that was sold to her. Baroness BonBon is a sweet (literally), upbeat, and mischievous young woman. Her mischievous side shows when she always eats a bon bon every year she attends Jollyween Candy Jam. As a monster, she has animal like instincts and is completely savage (animal wise), throwing and resisting the advances of the 7D trying to hug or kiss her.
characters.personality_section: Baroness BonBon is a sweet (literally), upbeat, and mischievous young woman. characters.name: Bashful
characters.description: Unknown(Bashful's agent voice in "Shapeshifter") Bashful Bashman the Bashter bashity bash bash bash (byGrumpy) InThe 7D, Bashful isextremelyshy and cowardly. He panics whenever his hat is removed in front of everyone, as shown in "Goldilocks and the 7D," where he has to find another object to cover his face. He is also good at hiding when being bothered. Bashful can also pop up unexpectedly in many different locations, and sometimes peek behind other characters. There are, however, signs of Bashful being brave. In "The Big Bash," he became a masked vigilante known as The Big Bash by accident. Riding on a bull, Bashful helps the people of Jollywood (saving a baby and helping a school pupil solve an algebraic equation are among the good deeds). The Big Bash's biggest break is when he saves Queen Delightful from falling when Grim's spell hit her goldenSky Bucket. Thanks to Bashful's disguise, the Queen doesn't know who the vigilante really was, but at least her left shoe returned to her (Bashful had it after a huge mishap he caused earlier in the episode). In "Bathtub Bashful," it's revealed that Bashful has a great singing voice similar to Elvis Presley's while in the shower. Queen Delightful stops by at The 7D's to find out where the voice came from, and invites Bashful to appear at her annualJollypaloozaconcert to replace asingerwho was forced to drop out. At first, Bashful didn't want to perform in front of the crowd (he was shown to sing in his normal voice outside the bathtub) but relented after being persuaded by Doc. At the talent show his Elvis-style voice wowed the crowd, and suddenly he gained the confidence to step out of the bathtub to perform in person while wooing Queen Delightful. It's also revealed in the same episode that since Doc has let Bashful down lots of times, Bashful has trouble trusting Doc. In "Jollybells", he along withHappyhelps all people in Jollywood to cheer up and get their joy back. Bashful can have different personas; in addition to the Big Bash, he's also known in "Shapeshifter" as Agent Bash, a brave super spy.

characters.name: Beavers
characters.description: Thebeaversfirst appeared in "Hildy the Good" and played a major role in helpingThe 7DsaveQueen Delightfultwice, including saving thekingdomlater. The beavers have the appearance of regular beavers complete with buckteeth, large brown noses and tails, though each of them has a different shade of brown.

characters.name: Big Bad Wolf
characters.description: Big Bad Wolfis a wolf who first appeared in "Big Bad Sneezy", where he trickedSneezyinto blowing down all the pigs' houses inPig Sty Springsafter observing his incredibly powerful sneeze which blasts off a tree and inviting him to his "huffing and puffing cooperation." But in the end, he was shot by Sneezy's strongest sneeze (intentionally) so far in the show which made him go around Earth until he got back to the ancient era of the dinosaurs. He briefly reappeared during the final scene of theSeason 2episode "The Enchanted Forest Ranger" among a group of villains headed by a mysterious squirrel. It is unknown how he returned to the present. He's also among another group of villains in "Shapeshifter". Big Bad Wolf is a blue-greyish wolf with a white collar and a blue and red striped tie, though in subsequent appearances his tie is solid blue.

characters.name: Bingo
characters.description: Bingois the henchman ofDr. Jingleheimer. He kidnappedDocfor hishatin the episode "Dr. Jingleheimer" for the scientist to use to make a shrink ray with its tools. Bingo is so named because everything he says is spot on. According to him, he needs to be precise. He vaguely resembles Igor.

characters.name: Bingo
characters.description: Bingois the henchman ofDr. Jingleheimer. He kidnappedDocfor hishatin the episode "Dr. Jingleheimer" for the scientist to use to make a shrink ray with its tools. Bingo is so named because everything he says is spot on. According to him, he needs to be precise. He vaguely resembles Igor.

characters.name: Bob the Squirrel
characters.description: Bob the Squirrelis a character that appeared several times throughoutThe 7D. He makes his debut inSeason 1's "Sneezin' Season". In three of his appearances, he is seen together withDopey. Bob has the appearance of a regular squirrel. He's brown and has big Tum without dots in them. Bob is playful and mischievous. He's friendly overall but he's shown to have a bit of dark side. For example, in "Sneezin' Season" he is fanatically laughing with the Glooms much to their surprise.
characters.personality_section: Bob is playful and mischievous. He's friendly overall but he's shown to have a bit of dark side. For example, in "Sneezin' Season" he is fanatically laughing with the Glooms much to their surprise.

characters.name: Candy Sprites
characters.description: Candy Sprites(binomial name: Candius spritius) are the creatures who are obsessed with all kinds of candies, living in theEnchanted Forest. In the episode "Big Rock Candy Flim-Flam" are two Candy Sprites, Sweetie (voiced bySherri Stoner) and Tangy (voiced byDeanna Oliver), who search forGrandmommers Whimsical's fudge andThe 7D's big rock candy. Tangy is pink skinned, wears a yellow shirt with a brown bow tie attached to it, brown-and-light brown striped pants and orange shoes, and has orange hair with two brown bow ties attached to each end. Sweetie is light blue skinned, wears a pink-and-magenta striped dress with an image of a heart, and purple hair with its top shaped like tubes with a blue bow tie holding them together; and she carries around with her a pink bag. Both sprites have pointed ears and wings on their backs.

characters.name: Cappy
characters.description: Cappyis an old man appearing as a part of a running gag in "Free Teensy". He warnsGrumpyabout theJolly-Go-Jumbo fisheach time he appears. He might have the same New York accent as Grumpy. He is voiced byPaul Rugg. Cappy wears a light blue shirt and green overalls, with a green and white cap with a simplified drawing of a fish on its top, and blue boots. He has brown hair and sideburns.

characters.name: Chicken Little
characters.description: Chicken Littleis the son ofJollywood JoeandJollywood Jane. He first appeared in "There's a Monkey in My Hat". He claimed that the sky is going to fall.

characters.name: Chicken Little
characters.description: Chicken Littleis the son ofJollywood JoeandJollywood Jane. He first appeared in "There's a Monkey in My Hat". He claimed that the sky is going to fall.

characters.name: Coach Coachy
characters.description: Coach Coachywas a character that appeared in the episode "Jollyball Anyone?". He was theJollyballcoach ofthe 7D. His eyes are hardly ever shown.

characters.name: Coach Coachy
characters.description: Coach Coachywas a character that appeared in the episode "Jollyball Anyone?". He was theJollyballcoach ofthe 7D. His eyes are hardly ever shown.

characters.name: Cobby
characters.description: CobbyisJollywood's cobbler and his only customer isGrumpy. He made his debut in "The Enchanted Shoes". He speaks with an Irish accent. He is voiced by Rob Paulsen. Cobby wears a yellow-green and green-yellow striped collar shirt with a dotted turquoise tie, brown trousers, gray shoes, and a white apron. His hair and beard are orange.

characters.name: Cobby
characters.description: CobbyisJollywood's cobbler and his only customer isGrumpy. He made his debut in "The Enchanted Shoes". He speaks with an Irish accent. He is voiced by Rob Paulsen. Cobby wears a yellow-green and green-yellow striped collar shirt with a dotted turquoise tie, brown trousers, gray shoes, and a white apron. His hair and beard are orange.

characters.name: Cow
characters.description: Thiscowis a minor character in the Season 1 episode "Surprise" and the only guest ofHildy's "surprise" party. After learning thatThe 7Dare throwing a surprise birthday party forQueen Delightful(though it's actually a birthday surprise forLord Starchbottom), Hildy wants a surprise party of her own (it wouldn't be a surprise that way). She ventures out outdoors in search for guests, but each of them freaked out because she's a witch. Finally, Hildy asks the cow to come to her party and then the cow moos, though Hildy doesn't understand if that's a yes. Later,Grimsurprises Hildy when she arrives home and she is happy that the cow's there.

characters.name: Crystal Ball
characters.description: Chris Hardwick[Universal] The magicCrystal Ballis used byHildyandGrimto spy on the citizens ofJollywoodto plot their misdeeds as well as their source of information. In addition to acting as an aide to the Glooms, the Crystal Ball also has a knack for telling bad jokes (often accompanied by canned laughter), which annoys Hildy but delights Grim.
characters.personality_section: In addition to acting as an aide to the Glooms, the Crystal Ball also has a knack for telling bad jokes (often accompanied by canned laughter), which annoys Hildy but delights Grim.

characters.name: Cuckoo
characters.description: Cuckoois the talking bird who announces time throughoutJollywood. He is one of at least two birds who does the job inside theTick Tock Clock Tower. He appeared in the episode "Big Rock Candy Flim-Flam". To be added

characters.name: Delivery
characters.description: Delivery, whom is the Jollywood postal carrier, is a background character usually seen along with otherJollywoodvillagers in several episodes. He delivers mail around the kingdom. He never had spoken lines throughout the series until "Free Teensy". In "You Ain't Seen Nothin' Yeti!he was encountered byHappy. He tells Happy he's afraid of delivering a singing Jollygram toHildy Gloom. He later had another spoken role in "Take Care of Your Elf!" when he delivered a postcard from theKingdom of the ElvestoGrumpy, and in "There's a Monkey in My Hat" when he helped create the monkeys-on-hats craze in Jollywood.

characters.name: Dirk Dumphrey
characters.description: Dirk Dumphreyis a ranger patrolling theEnchanted Forestand the titular main antagonist of the episode "The Enchanted Forest Ranger", voiced by guest star Phil Hendrie. He is known for handling out selfish punishments over each "violation" of the forest code. Dirk givesthe 7Da hard time as they helpGrumpyearn a Dragon Scouts badge by spending the night in the woods together. The ranger's true actions are revealed at the end of the episode.

characters.name: Dirk Dumphrey
characters.description: Dirk Dumphreyis a ranger patrolling theEnchanted Forestand the titular main antagonist of the episode "The Enchanted Forest Ranger", voiced by guest star Phil Hendrie. He is known for handling out selfish punishments over each "violation" of the forest code. Dirk givesthe 7Da hard time as they helpGrumpyearn a Dragon Scouts badge by spending the night in the woods together. The ranger's true actions are revealed at the end of the episode.

characters.name: Doc
characters.description: --FromThe 7D Mine TrainAppDocis the leader ofthe seven dwarfswho help protectJollywoodinThe 7D, and is also highly intelligent as well as an inventor of gadgets. His hat is known to house many tools that can be used in times of need as well as performing simple tasks. In "The Long, Long Winter," he led the mission to go saveJollywood Joe. He is voiced by Bill Farmer, who also voicedSleepyfrom 1994. Doc’s uniform consists of a dark green and turquoise striped hat, which houses many gadgets inside, a light blue shirt with a red bow tie, pale green shorts with turquoise suspenders, dark blue clogs, and large red round glasses. He is the second dwarf to sport a blond colored beard, the first beingHappy. InThe 7D, Doc is portrayed as the brains of the group. His machines and other gadgets are pretty advanced in the series' timeline and setting, and it even helped the residents of Jollywood (Sky Bucketsare one example) and the dwarfs themselves. However, he can make mistakes and is pretty quick to admit so. In "The Very Important Thingy", he can't work on acreationQueen Delightful had commissioned him for with so many distractions. He eventually overcomes this obstacle by building it with a considerable amount of noise without even knowing beforehand, though he realizes that he was more worried that he would fail the Queen. Despite his smarts, he can be as goofy as the other dwarfs, such as the time he failed to seeGrim Gloomthrough his disguise as Toasty in "Grim the Genius", saying that he was "blinded by its deliciousness" when he was offered toast, his favorite food. He can react wildly during his observations; in "Take Me To Your Grumpy" he became fascinated with rainbows so much that he went to drastic measures to study them while reacting wildly to them, and in "Take Care of Your Elf!" he is very eager to learn aboutelvesand their culture.

characters.name: Dopey
characters.description: --FromThe 7D Mine Trainapp. Dopeyis one ofthe seven dwarfswho protectJollywoodinThe 7D. He only communicates by whistling; however he can do various other sounds. He's also very good with animals. Dopey's leitmotif is "The Dopey Song". As usual in all previous Disney appearances, Dopey never talks. InThe 7D, however, he whistles as a means of communication and he can understand his fellow dwarfs. He's also good at pantomiming. Dopey has a strong love of animals. In "Sneezin' Season" he is seen playing withBobthe squirrel and in "The 8th D" he helped a baby elephant by removing a rolled little hedgehog/porcupine that was on its foot and took him home, but later set him free after realizing that such animals belong in the wild. Dopey is also exceptionally skilled in painting and drawing ("The Littlest Giants" and "Uncle Humidor") and performing as a magician ("Abraca-Dopey"). Unfortunately he seems to be quite unintelligent as his name suggests, however in the pilot, he was the dwarf who came up with the plan to remove the pipes from the organ.

characters.name: Dr. Jingleheimer (character)
characters.description: Dr. Jingleheimeris a minor character and the antagonist of the episode "Dr. Jingleheimer", voiced by Paul Rugg. He kidnapsDocso he can use his hat to help with his plans of shrinkingJollywoodto use in his toy train set. Dr. Jingleheimer wears a white lab coat, yellow gloves, grey leggings and black boots. He also has red hair with white stripes both sides and has big dark red eyebrows like a mad scientist. He also often wears mad scientist glasses to work on his plan. InDr. Jingleheimer, he orders his minion,Bingoto kidnapDocfor thehatso he can shrinkJollywoodfor his train set he worked on. He also dislikesHappy'ssinging which gets him annoyed.
